message:
fix: use current-context as default cluster in Kubectl terminal (#3833) (#3847)

The Kubectl terminal previously defaulted to clusters[0], which could
vary across refreshes depending on API response ordering. Now it looks
for the cluster marked as isCurrent (the user's kubeconfig current-context)
and falls back to clusters[0] only if no current context is found.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
